query_title: Disaster L.A.: The Last Zombie Apocalypse Begins Here

recommendations.title: Right at Your Door
recommendations.overview: A dirty bomb goes off in Los Angeles, jamming freeways and spreading a toxic cloud.

recommendations.title: Skyline
recommendations.overview: When strange lights descend on the city of Los Angeles, people are drawn outside like moths to a flame where an extraterrestrial force threatens to swallow the entire human population off the face of the Earth. Now the band of survivors must fight fo

recommendations.title: The Human Race
recommendations.overview: A cancer survivor, an amputee, several immigrants, and many others are snatched from a Los Angeles street and forced to take part in a deadly race.

recommendations.title: Left Behind
recommendations.overview: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish during the rapture and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

recommendations.title: Warriors of Future
recommendations.overview: When a meteor carrying a destructive plant strikes the world, a suicide squad is given hours to save their post-apocalyptic city from total collapse.

recommendations.title: Infestation
recommendations.overview: After being stung by a giant insect, Cooper learns that these bugs are attacking the whole city. He joins forces with the survivors, in order to find a way to counter-attack.

recommendations.title: Darkman II: The Return of Durant
recommendations.overview: Darkman and Durant return and they hate each other as much as ever. This time, Durant has plans to take over the city's drug trade using high-tech weaponry. Darkman must step in and try to stop Durant once and for all.

recommendations.title: Jeruzalem
recommendations.overview: When a couple of American young adults fly to Israel to visit the city of Jerusalem, a biblical nightmare falls upon the city.

recommendations.title: 10.0 Earthquake
recommendations.overview: Los Angeles is about to be hit by a devastating earthquake, and time is running out to save the city from imminent danger.

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Hedorah
recommendations.overview: An ever evolving alien life-form arrives on a comet from the Dark Gaseous Nebula and proceeds to consume pollution. Spewing mists of sulfuric acid and corrosive sludge, neither humanity nor Godzilla may be able to defeat this toxic menace.
